LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANTS ANNETTE SHELTON, LARRY SHELTON, ALEXANDRA SHELTON-JIMMERSON'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO 4/5/07. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600.

LAW AND MOTION, 302, BEFORE ARGUMENT THE COURT CORRECTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING TO DENY THE MOTION TO STRIKE. MOTION WAS THEN ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED THE CORRECTED TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS ANNETTE SHELTON, LARRY SHELTON, ALEXANDRA SHELTON-JIMMERSON'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS DENIED; REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES IS DENIED. ASSUMING ANTI-SLAPP APPLIES TO UD CASES, PLAINTIFF'S ACTION IS BASED ON A LOGICAL FACTUAL BASIS AND NOT IN RESPONSE TO DEFENDANT'S PETITIONING ACTIVITIES. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
